meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes Subcommittee on the taxonomy of the suborder Micrococcineae: Minutes of the inaugural meeting, 29 July 2002, Paris, France
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 4. Acting Chairman's introductory remarks
P. Schumann gave a short survey of the history of ICSB subcommittees responsible for organisms that currently belong to the suborder Micrococcineae, on attempts to propose minimal standards for these organisms and on the rationale for establishing a subcommittee on the taxonomy of the suborder Micrococcineae. The proposed name Subcommittee on the Taxonomy of the Suborder Micrococcineae was approved by the members.

Minute 5. Election of officers
The acting Chairman nominated L. I. Evtushenko as Secretary and presented her written acceptance of candidacy. P. Schumann was elected Chairman and L. I. Evtushenko was elected Secretary in absentia. Both officers were elected unanimously.
